summary: First-pass full e2e test of Ybex MVP. 22/22 backend pytest tests pass (after fixing one test-side email case). Frontend critical flows all working: landing renders, login (t3@ybex.demo) succeeds and redirects to /dashboard with 'Welcome back!' toast, Explore shows 26 creator cards with rate cards + ER badges, creator profile renders with rate card / performance score / social / past brands, Wave triggers 'Wave sent!' toast, Collab modal opens with deliverable/offer/message form, Campaigns page lists 7 live campaigns, Post Campaign modal opens with all fields, Notifications page renders and 'Mark all read' works, Settings shows account info, Leaderboard shows ranked creators with category filters. Design follows spec: bone-white bg #F7F5F2, vermillion orange #E84A27 CTAs, forest green #1A4331 accents, Cabinet Grotesk headlines.

minor.issue: Signature has `request: Request = None` AFTER query params with defaults. Works in practice because FastAPI dependency-injects Request by type, but mixing Optional[bool] mine + Optional Request is fragile; consider making `request: Request` first param or split into 2 endpoints.
`action` is taken as plain function arg, so FastAPI exposes it as a query param (e.g. ?action=accept). Works but a POST body would be more idiomatic. Documented for awareness.

issues: Console shows 401 from /api/auth/me on first paint. This is benign (AuthContext probes session), but consider suppressing the console error or short-circuiting the call when no cookie/token is present to keep DevTools clean.

testability_gaps.issue: Campaign card lacks data-testid prefix `campaign-card-{id}` — Explore creator cards already have `creator-card-{id}`. Adding parallel testid would help future automation.

Logout control exists as an icon button in the top-right header. Could not find data-testid='logout-button' or text 'Logout' selector. Recommend adding data-testid='logout-button' to the header logout icon AND optionally surfacing a labeled Logout button on Settings page.

action_items: (Optional, low priority) Suppress benign 401 console error on first /auth/me call when no token present.
(Optional, low priority) Add data-testid='campaign-card-{id}' on Campaigns page card and data-testid='logout-button' on header logout icon for future automated test coverage.
(Optional) Consider moving `request: Request` to be the first parameter of /api/campaigns GET handler for cleaner FastAPI signature.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py at 650 lines is approaching the 700-line guideline; consider splitting into routers (auth, creators, campaigns, collabs, notifications) before adding more endpoints.
Email normalisation is correct (lowercase on signup/login) but /auth/signup stores name verbatim — fine.
MongoDB _id is properly excluded from every find/find_one (verified across all endpoints).
JWT secret falls back to 'dev-secret' if JWT_SECRET env missing — acceptable for MVP, but log a warning in production.
bcrypt + jwt + cookie set with secure=true/samesite=none — correct for cross-origin Emergent preview.
Mock compute_engagement_score is deterministic per user_id as stated — verified.
test_credentials: Brand: t3@ybex.demo / password123 (used). New creator signups: TEST/CREATOR_<uuid>@ybex.demo / password123 (auto-created by test fixtures, role assigned via /auth/role).
seed_data_creation: Tests created a handful of TEST_ prefixed creators, brand campaigns (TEST_Campaign_*, ApplyTest), waves, collabs, notifications under t3@ybex.demo's account. Non-destructive — only additive.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_ybex_api.py covers all 21 endpoints in the request. Run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_ybex_api.py -v. Brand login t3@ybex.demo/password123 works. For creator flows, signup a new user then POST /auth/role with role='creator'. Mock scoring is deterministic per user_id (see compute_engagement_score). Frontend: landing, login, signup, onboarding, explore, creator profile, campaigns, campaign detail, collabs, leaderboard, notifications, settings, dashboard all functional. Header has logout icon (no data-testid yet). Wave & Collab modal flows on creator profile work end-to-end with toast confirmations.
rca of the issue: No blocking issues. The single test failure during my first run was a test-side comparison bug (email case-sensitivity): backend correctly lowercases emails on signup, my assertion compared raw signup email. Fixed by using .lower() on both sides — backend behaviour is correct.
